note: Canonicalization vectors for the harness-contract sha form: json.dumps(sort_keys=True, separators=(',',':'), ensure_ascii=False) -> UTF-8 -> SHA-256 lowercase hex. Reference: state/determinism.py::canonical_sha. `value` may carry the {"__float__": "nan"|"inf"|"-inf"} sentinel for floats strict JSON cannot represent; decode before hashing. `divergence_from` is null for a pure form pin, else names the implementation whose bytes DIFFER from the harness form: 'jcs' (RFC 8785 UTF-16 key order / ECMAScript number canon), 'default-json' (ensure_ascii=True escaping), or 'strict-json' (NaN/Infinity are non-JSON) -- the deliberate contract divergence.

cases.name: nested_sort
cases.note: recursive key sort; array order is preserved (never sorted)

cases.name: non_ascii_values_unescaped
cases.note: ensure_ascii=False emits raw UTF-8; a DEFAULT json.dumps (ensure_ascii=True) escapes to \uXXXX and diverges here (JCS also keeps raw UTF-8, so this is a default-json divergence, not a JCS one)

cases.name: non_ascii_key_codepoint_order
cases.note: form pin: code-point key order e(0x65) < z(0x7a) < e-acute(0xe9); all BMP so UTF-16 order agrees -- the real code-point/UTF-16 split needs an astral key (see astral_vs_bmp_key_order)

cases.name: astral_vs_bmp_key_order
cases.note: THE JCS split: Python sorts by CODE POINT -> z, U+FFFF, U+1F600; RFC 8785/JCS sorts by UTF-16 code unit -> the astral U+1F600 (lead surrogate 0xD83D) precedes U+FFFF. A silent JCS swap reorders the keys and fails this digest loudly.

cases.name: int_vs_float_distinct
cases.note: int 1 and float 1.0 render distinctly (1 vs 1.0); JCS collapses both to 1

cases.name: float_exponent_form
cases.note: form pin: Python repr -> 1e+21 (pins the exponent spelling)

cases.name: no_unicode_normalization
cases.note: pin: neither our form nor JCS applies NFC/NFD; the NFC (U+00E9) and NFD (e + U+0301) values keep distinct byte content (a normalizing impl would collide them)

cases.name: special_float_nan
cases.note: Python json.dumps allows NaN by default -> NaN ; strict JSON / JCS FORBID it

cases.name: special_float_inf
cases.note: Python -> Infinity ; strict JSON / JCS forbid
